guide.expanded.title: Vampirism Expanded
guide.expanded.overview.text:
Vampirism Expanded adds new hunter and vampire skill trees that build on Vampirism's existing systems.
Use the other entries in this chapter to learn how each part works in practice.
guide.expanded.tasks.text:
Vampirism Expanded adds special faction quests that award skill points for the Expanded hunter and vampire trees.
These quests are meant to appear only once you have reached the end of the faction progression: hunter or vampire level 14, and lord rank 5.
If you do not see them yet, keep progressing your faction rank and lord rank before checking again.
guide.expanded.hunter_tree.text:
The Expanded Hunters tree provides the starting point for the new hunter progression path.
It is where the hunter-only skills in this mod branch from the existing Vampirism skill system.
guide.expanded.hunter_root.text:
Expanded Hunters is the root skill for the expanded hunter skill tree.
It marks the entry point for the new hunter-specific progression.
skill.expanded.poisonous_blood.desc: Your blood becomes toxic to vampires that try to drink it.
guide.expanded.poisonous_blood.text: Poisonous Blood makes your blood toxic to vampires. When a vampire attempts to drink from you, the feeding is interrupted and they are briefly poisoned.
skill.expanded.garlic_blood.desc: Your blood carries the stench of garlic. Vampires who drink from you become affected by Garlic.
guide.expanded.garlic_blood.text:
Garlic Blood makes your blood smell and taste like garlic to vampires. If a vampire successfully drinks from you, they gain Garlic for 10 seconds after the sip.
This effect triggers after the feeding succeeds and is untraceable for vampires.
guide.expanded.vampire_tree.text:
The Expanded Vampires tree provides the starting point for the new vampire progression path.
It connects the mod's vampire-specific skills to the existing Vampirism progression.
guide.expanded.vampire_root.text:
Expanded Vampires is the root skill for the expanded vampire skill tree.
It marks the entry point for the new vampire-specific progression.
guide.expanded.hunter_skill_points_1.tex: Field Training is a hunter faction quest that awards 1 expanded hunter skill point.
guide.expanded.hunter_skill_points_2.tex: Veteran Hunt is a hunter faction quest that awards 2 expanded hunter skill points.
guide.expanded.vampire_skill_points_1.te: Night Supplies is a vampire faction quest that awards 1 expanded vampire skill point.
guide.expanded.vampire_skill_points_2.te: Ancient Ritual is a vampire faction quest that awards 2 expanded vampire skill points.
text.expanded.faction_level_unlocker.min: Unlocked for %s at level %s or higher
